seoTitle: Freshwater Point vs Fulham — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Freshwater Point and Fulham. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Freshwater Point vs Fulham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Freshwater Point and Fulham.
heading: Freshwater Point vs Fulham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Freshwater Point, Queensland and Fulham, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Freshwater Point has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Fulham (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Freshwater Point or Fulham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Freshwater Point has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Fulham scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Freshwater Point scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Fulham scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Freshwater Point or Fulham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Freshwater Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
